title: "Superman to Clark Kent": Clavicular heavily trolled after quitting testosterone as viral transformation shocks viewers
summary_full: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular, whose real name is Braden Peters, faced intense online criticism after appearing noticeably different following his decision to quit testosterone and other substances. The backlash came weeks after a hospitalization linked to a health scare that prompted him to rethink his lifestyle. While critics mocked his reduced physique, many supporters praised his choice to prioritize long-term health and well-being over maintaining an image built around extreme looksmaxxing practices.
